Description:

Usage:
  _build [command] [options]

Options:
  --domain <domain>                The domain to use for the build [default: localhost]
  -e, --environment <environment>  The environment to use for the build [default: Development]
  --version                        Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                   Show help and usage information

Commands:
  tye         Tye command line interface
  pipeline    Pipeline file related
  build
  kubernetes  Kubernetes related

  --push                           Should push to registry [default: False]
  --domain <domain>                The domain to use for the build [default: localhost]
  -e, --environment <environment>  The environment to use for the build [default: Development]
  -?, -h, --help                   Show help and usage information
